title: Define domain order errors
scenario: Domain errors should name business-rule failures without mentioning databases, HTTP, or UI details.
instructions: Define CreateOrderError with EmptyOrder and InvalidQuantity variants.

hints.body: Focus on the one public API shape requested by the lesson.
Prefer standard traits, typed errors, borrowed views, and explicit boundary conversions.
A canonical idiomatic solution is shown below.

completionExplanation: This lesson keeps boundary-domain-error explicit in the type system and checks public behavior without relying on panics or unchecked shortcuts.
